text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! You reached your goal! Well
done! Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The goals that you're after will differ
depending on the Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Please help your trainees reach their
goals during their Careers!
